title: Reports from the Chief Public Health Officer - Canada.ca
content:
## Reports from the Chief Public Health Officer
Every year, the Chief Public Health Officer reports on the state of public health in Canada. These reports summarize evidence on high-priority public health issues and provide a way forward to improve the health of Canadians.
For older reports, visit the Library and Archives Canada Web archive .
